---
title: "Nicholas Potter"
image: images/portrait1.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/econpotter
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Nel4Y1MAAAAJ
    - text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3410-3732
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/econpotter
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV
      href: files/potter-cv.pdf
---

I'm a Research Economist at the USDA Economic Research Service working on water, climate, and agriculture issues. 
At ERS I'm also the liaison for ERS's Databricks integration and serve on the GitHub Steering Committee, helping the agency build reproducible research workflows that still meet a Federal statistical agency's mandate to protect confidential data. 
Outside of that role I build AI-centered tools for water, climate, and agricultural economics.


## Selected publications

- Yourek, M., Daniel Haller, Nicholas A. Potter, Kirti Rajagopalan, Kairon Shayne D. Garcia, and Jon Yoder. 2026. Water right forfeiture in Washington state from 1967 to 2019, Water Policy. [doi:10.2166/wp.2026.096](https://doi.org/10.2166/wp.2026.096).
- Potter, N.A., Hrozencik, R.A., & Wallander, S. (2025). Irrigation
  Organizations: Organization Types and Governance. *USDA Economic Research
  Service*, EB-45.
  [ers.usda.gov](https://www.ers.usda.gov/publications/pub-details?pubid=113263).
- Cameron-Harp, M.V., Hendricks, N.P., & Potter, N.A. (2024). Predicting the
  spatial variation in cost-efficiency for agricultural greenhouse gas
  mitigation programs in the U.S. *Carbon Balance and Management*.
  [doi:10.1186/s13021-024-00252-6](https://doi.org/10.1186/s13021-024-00252-6).
- Hrozencik, R.A., Potter, N.A., & Wallander, S. (2023). The Cost-Effectiveness
  of Irrigation Canal Lining and Piping in the Western United States. In
  *American Agriculture, Water Resources, and Climate Change* (University of
  Chicago Press).
  [doi:10.7208/chicago/9780226830629.003.0004](https://doi.org/10.7208/chicago/9780226830629.003.0004)
- Potter, N.A., Hrozencik, R.A., & Wallander, S. (2023). Irrigation
  Organizations: Water Inflows and Outflows. *USDA Economic Research Service*,
  EB-36.
  [ers.usda.gov](https://www.ers.usda.gov/publications/pub-details?pubid=107066)
- Potter, N.A. (2019). rnassqs: An R package to access agricultural data via
  the USDA-NASS Quick Stats API. *Journal of Open Source Software*.
  [doi:10.21105/joss.01880](https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.01880).

Full list on [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3410-3732) and
[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Nel4Y1MAAAAJ).

## Selected Projects

- [rnassqs](https://github.com/ropensci/rnassqs) — R package to fetch data using the USDA NASS Quick Stats API; on [CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=rnassqs) since 2019.
- [herdr](https://github.com/econpotter/herdr) — fork of the terminal agent multiplexer with render-path performance patches.
- [orchestra](https://github.com/econpotter/orchestra) — self-built dispatcher using sandboxed agents to work on queued issues.
- [openbrain](https://github.com/econpotter/openbrain) — personal AI memory and knowledge base drawn from [OB1](https://github.com/NateBJones-Projects/OB1).
- [agentic-researcher](https://github.com/econpotter/agentic-researcher) — automated economics-research pipeline to conduct literature searches and other tasks.

See my [GitHub](https://github.com/econpotter) for more.
